task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Nature Papers' collection was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The collection name 'Nature Papers' is visible in the left sidebar (collections pane) of Zotero.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'NeurIPS Papers' collection was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The collection name 'NeurIPS Papers' is visible in the left sidebar (collections pane) of Zotero.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the 'Nature Papers' collection to view its contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Nature Papers' collection is highlighted/selected in the left sidebar, and its contents are displayed in the middle pane in at least one screenshot.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Nature Papers' collection contains the correct papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'Nature Papers' is selected, the middle pane shows exactly 3 papers: 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids...', 'Deep Learning', and 'Mastering the Game of Go...'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened the 'NeurIPS Papers' collection to view its contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'NeurIPS Papers' collection is highlighted/selected in the left sidebar, and its contents are displayed in the middle pane in at least one screenshot.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'NeurIPS Papers' collection contains the correct papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When 'NeurIPS Papers' is selected, the middle pane shows exactly 4 papers: 'Attention Is All You Need', 'ImageNet Classification...', 'Generative Adversarial Nets', and 'Language Models are Few-Shot Learners'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to create collections and move papers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Zotero application open with the agent clicking on menus, dragging papers, or using Zotero dialog boxes, rather than terminal commands modifying the database.

integrity.description: The agent moved the existing papers rather than creating fake empty items.
integrity.visual_evidence: The papers in the collections should appear as standard Zotero items (e.g., with creator names, years, and proper icons) rather than manually typed empty items.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Nature Papers' collection must contain exactly 3 papers: 'Molecular Structure of Nucleic Acids: A Structure for Deoxyribose Nucleic Acid', 'Deep Learning', and 'Mastering the Game of Go with Deep Neural Networks and Tree Search'. The 'NeurIPS Papers' collection must contain exactly 4 papers: 'Attention Is All You Need', 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks', 'Generative Adversarial Nets', and 'Language Models are Few-Shot Learners'. The collection names are case-sensitive.
